hero.headline: Data Engineer & Solutions Architect
profileLines: I entered the data discipline over a decade ago through operational roles in maritime construction and Oil&Gas, where construction project management required exploiting the data. I now lead cloud data platforms and enterprise integration.
Hands-on across BI, scalable pipelines (GCP, Azure, Snowflake, Fabric), and SAP–Salesforce integration.
Technical lead and solutions architect: from architecture design through delivery of large-scale data solutions.
Over ten years focused on making data reliable, accessible, and actionable for business decisions; I contribute to the market’s evolution through blockchain solutions and AI integration.

heroVariant2.headline: Data Architect & BI Consultant
heroVariant2.subheadline: End-to-end data architecture, cloud data pipelines (GCP, Azure, Snowflake, Fabric), and enterprise integration (SAP–Salesforce).

stats.label: Scope
stats.value: End-to-end data architecture, from design through delivery

stats.label: Outcomes
stats.value: Scalable pipelines, near real-time reporting, governed analytics

services.title: Data Platforms
services.description: Design and implementation of cloud data platforms: ingestion, storage, transformation, and orchestration. Medallion architectures, dbt, Airflow, Data Vault.

services.title: Analytics & BI
services.description: BI ecosystems, semantic models, KPIs and dashboards. Power BI, SSAS Tabular, DAX, Snowflake. Governance, RLS, and data quality.

services.title: Blockchain Analytics
services.description: On-chain data indexing, risk and credit scoring for DeFi. Proof-of-concepts and analytics pipelines for Web3 use cases.

contact.ctaSecondary: Email for inquiries and project discussions.
